description: As one of Iceland’s most successful exports, singer-songwriter Ásgeir has always pushed the boundaries of his thoughtful brand of folk-pop. His debut album, Dýrð í dauðaþögn, became the best-selling debut in Icelandic history, leading to the English-language version, ‘In The Silence’ in 2014.  He continued to refine his sound with albums Afterglow, Bury The Moon, and Time On My Hands, earning praise from press and radio worldwide, including The Independent, MOJO, NME, Clash Magazine, BBC 6 Music and Radio X.
title: Ásgeir Concert
